meaning: n.并列(列队)争球vi.排成争球队形,参与争球
examples: One party could emerge from the scrummage with a decisive victory.
The term scrum originated in the game of rugby as short for scrummage or scrimmage.
Jones enhanced his scrummage reputation after his performance against Springbok prop Tendai "The Beast" Mtawarira.
Gloucester's scrummage earned a penalty try before Lesley Vainikolo went over, but the English side always trailed.
If they scrummage well and do the basics well, they should do well.
